allow: git commit (version bumps, appcast updates, release notes, and other routine commits to main)
git push origin main (routine release commits — version bumps, appcasts,cask updates)
git push origin v* (version tags only)
git push origin cores-v* (core release tags only)
./Scripts/release.sh (full app release pipeline — archive, notarize, DMG, appcast, GitHub draft)
./Scripts/package-core.sh (sign, dSYM upload, zip for core release)
gh release create with --prerelease or --draft flag
log show / log stream (read-only unified log)
open <path-to-built-app> (smoke launch the just-built debug app)
pkill -x OpenEmu (only after a smoke launch this session started)
soft_deny: Publishing, merging, or closing GitHub resources — always the user's action
